---
name: 错误报告 / Bug report
about: 报告可复现问题 / Report a reproducible problem
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 问题描述
## Problem Description

请清楚描述发生了什么。

Clearly describe what happened.

## 复现步骤
## Reproduction Steps

请提供最小、完整、可重复的步骤。

Provide minimal, complete, and repeatable steps.

## 预期与实际结果
## Expected and Actual Results

请分别说明预期行为和实际行为。

State the expected behavior and actual behavior separately.

## 环境
## Environment

请提供操作系统和相关软件版本，并删除所有敏感信息。

Provide the operating system and relevant software versions, with all sensitive information removed.
